--- title: "4. Compact Comparison" subtitle: "Silhouette Scores Across All Three Settings" --- This table shows the chosen k and the corresponding silhouette score for each of the three segmentation settings. ::: {#cell-final-comparison .cell execution_count=2} ::: {#final-comparison .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=2} ```{=html}
dataset chosen_k silhouette_at_k
0 Survey 3 0.491
1 Transaction 3 0.632
2 CRM 3 0.287
``` ::: ::: All three settings find a reasonably clean three-cluster solution with synthetic data. In practice, silhouette scores on real data are often lower, and the choice of k requires more judgment than the elbow and silhouette plots alone can provide.
